news.paragraph: The DRAM ETF is experiencing significant momentum, having doubled in value during 2026 and seeing massive daily inflows of $863 million. This growth is being driven by an AI-led supercycle in memory chips, with Micron playing a key role in the fund's rapid expansion to $6.5 billion. Traders should monitor this intense demand and the ongoing AI-driven trend in the semiconductor sector.
headlines: Massive Demand for Memory Fund: DRAM ETF Is Now Up 100% in 2026
Daily ETF Flows: $863M Flows Into DRAM
Micron helps DRAM become the fastest ETF to hit $6.5 billion: Chart of the Day
Why Sandisk (Not Micron) Could Be the Biggest Winner Of the AI Memory Era
Micron Stock Extends Hot Streak. AI Supercycle Sends Chip Stocks Soaring
